sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὕψωμα

- Transliteration: Hupsoma

- Phonetic: hoop'-so-mah

- Definition:

1. thing elevated, height

a. of space

b. elevated structure i.e. barrier, rampart, bulwark

- Origin: from G5312

- TDNT entry: 18:13,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G5312; an elevated place or thing that is (abstractly) altitude or (by implication) a barrier (figurative): - height high thing.
